_note: Per-environment test config. Select with TEST_ENV (default = common.DEFAULT_TEST_ENV). 'common' is merged into every env (with ${TEST_ENV.X} resolved from the selected env block). 'environments' holds per-app baseUrl + the env-specific API_HOST. User credentials/profile test data lives in testData/users.json and is flattened by loadEnv to CX_<APP>_<ROLE>_* process.env keys.
